channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: CSIS Names John M. Adams Chief Financial Officer
item.description: The Center for Strategic and International Studies (CSIS) today announced that John M. Adams has been appointed as Chief Financial Officer (CFO).

item.title: Venezuelans Welcome U.S. Intervention, But Hope for a Rapid Democratic Transition Post-Maduro
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Senior Adviser Mark Feirstein and Senior Associate Mary Speck analyze public opinion trends shaping Venezuela post-Maduro.

item.title: The Power of Innovation: The Strategic Value of China’s High-Tech Drive
item.description: Scott Kennedy analyzes how China’s advancement across high-tech sectors has directly strengthened the country’s international power and influence, and outlines how governments can pragmatically respond to these developments.

item.title: A New Era: Space After New START
item.description: In the post–New START era, how can the United States maintain strategic stability and pursue risk reduction—especially in space? As nuclear competition with Russia and China grows, missile defense and space security will shape what comes next.
